ice-3.name: DB ICE 3
ice-3.signature: A low-floor white nose, red waist stripe, and distributed traction made it the international face of German high-speed rail.

tgv-duplex.name: SNCF TGV Duplex
tgv-duplex.signature: Its two-level passenger cars let France add seats on busy high-speed routes without lengthening station platforms.

sbb-re-460.name: SBB Re 460
sbb-re-460.signature: The smooth Pininfarina-influenced shell became a Swiss mainline icon for fast InterCity and InterRegio services.

eurostar-e320.name: Eurostar e320
eurostar-e320.signature: A multi-system Velaro built for Channel Tunnel routes and through-running across several European power networks.

frecciarossa-1000.name: Frecciarossa 1000
frecciarossa-1000.signature: The long red nose and black window band turned Italy's flagship high-speed train into a moving brand mark.

obb-taurus.name: OeBB Taurus
obb-taurus.signature: Its ES64U2 platform became famous on Railjet services and set a conventional electric-locomotive speed record.

intercity-125.name: InterCity 125
intercity-125.signature: The HST brought 125 mph diesel service to Britain's non-electrified main lines and stayed in frontline use for decades.

renfe-ave-s103.name: Renfe AVE S-103
renfe-ave-s103.signature: Spain's Velaro E linked Madrid and Barcelona with one of Europe's fastest regular high-speed services.

sbb-giruno.name: SBB Giruno
sbb-giruno.signature: Built for Gotthard Base Tunnel services, the Giruno is a low-floor cross-border train for Switzerland, Italy and Germany.

sj-x2000.name: SJ X2000
sj-x2000.signature: Its active tilt let Sweden raise journey speeds on curving legacy routes without rebuilding every main line.

thalys-pbka.name: Thalys PBKA
thalys-pbka.signature: The PBKA sets were built for four countries and four power systems, making them a true cross-border TGV variant.

db-class-103.name: DB Class 103
db-class-103.signature: A cream-and-red flagship of German InterCity service, the Class 103 became one of Europe's most recognizable electric locomotives.

siemens-vectron.name: Siemens Vectron
siemens-vectron.signature: A modular export locomotive built for cross-border freight and passenger work across much of Europe.

ns-virm.name: NS VIRM
ns-virm.signature: The yellow double-decker is a familiar Dutch intercity workhorse, built to move crowds on busy main lines.

alfa-pendular.name: Alfa Pendular
alfa-pendular.signature: Portugal's flagship tilting train links Lisbon, Porto and the Algarve with a Pendolino-derived body and Iberian-gauge running gear.

vr-sm3.name: VR Sm3
vr-sm3.signature: Finland's broad-gauge Pendolino brought tilting high-speed service to long-distance routes under Nordic conditions.

etr-500.name: FS ETR 500
etr-500.signature: The ETR 500 was Italy's purpose-built high-speed flagship before the ETR 1000 era.

sncf-bb-26000.name: SNCF BB 26000
sncf-bb-26000.signature: The Sybic class was built as a versatile French locomotive for both passenger expresses and freight.

eurostar-class-373.name: Eurostar Class 373
eurostar-class-373.signature: The original Channel Tunnel train linked London, Paris and Brussels with a long TGV-derived formation.

renfe-s102.name: Renfe AVE S-102
renfe-s102.signature: Nicknamed Pato for its duck-bill nose, the S-102 pairs Talgo coaches with high-speed power cars.

cd-class-680.name: CD Class 680
cd-class-680.signature: The Czech Pendolino brought active tilting and multisystem operation to Central European express routes.

pkp-ed250.name: PKP ED250
pkp-ed250.signature: Poland's Pendolino introduced premium high-speed intercity service on upgraded domestic corridors.

sncb-class-18.name: SNCB Class 18
sncb-class-18.signature: Belgium's Class 18 is a multisystem Siemens locomotive used on intercity and international services.

db-class-218.name: DB Class 218
db-class-218.signature: The Class 218 became the standard West German mainline diesel for passenger and freight work on non-electrified routes.

ice-1.name: DB ICE 1
ice-1.signature: Germany's first production ICE introduced the white-and-red high-speed look that still defines the brand.

class-390-pendolino.name: Class 390 Pendolino
class-390-pendolino.nickname: West Coast Main Line tilting train
class-390-pendolino.signature: Its tilt system helped raise speeds on Britain's curving West Coast Main Line without a brand-new railway.

ns-icm-koploper.name: NS Koploper
ns-icm-koploper.signature: The raised cab gave the Koploper its name and once allowed passengers to walk through coupled trainsets.

dsb-ic3.name: DSB IC3
dsb-ic3.signature: The rubber-faced IC3 can couple nose-to-nose and open a full-width gangway between units.

coradia-ilint.name: Coradia iLint
coradia-ilint.signature: The iLint became the first hydrogen fuel-cell passenger train to enter regular service.

stadler-flirt.name: Stadler FLIRT
stadler-flirt.nickname: Fast Light Intercity and Regional Train
stadler-flirt.signature: The modular low-floor FLIRT became one of Europe's most widespread modern regional train families.

amtrak-metroliner.name: Budd Metroliner / Amtrak Metroliner EMU
amtrak-metroliner.signature: A stainless-steel American EMU that brought modern high-speed branding to the Northeast Corridor before reliability issues pushed Amtrak toward locomotive-hauled Amfleet service.

bavarian-s3-6.name: Bavarian S 3/6
bavarian-s3-6.signature: Long-lived Bavarian compound Pacific known for elegant proportions, efficient express work, and service from the royal railway era into the Bundesbahn age.

belgian-type-12.name: Belgian State Railways/SNCB Type 12
belgian-type-12.signature: A rare fully streamlined Belgian Atlantic built for very fast short expresses before World War II.

budd-rdc.name: Budd Rail Diesel Car (RDC)
budd-rdc.signature: Stainless-steel 'train in one car' that kept light passenger services economical.

drg-class-05.name: DRG Class 05 streamlined express steam locomotive

flying-scotsman.name: LNER Class A3 4472 Flying Scotsman
flying-scotsman.signature: The first steam locomotive officially authenticated at 100 mph.

lms-coronation.name: LMS Coronation Class streamlined steam locomotive

mistral-cc-40100.name: SNCF CC 40100
mistral-cc-40100.signature: Sharp-nosed French quad-voltage TEE locomotive built for fast cross-border prestige trains of the Le Mistral era.

ns-mat-54.name: NS Mat '54
ns-mat-54.signature: Its broad Hondekop nose made the Dutch Mat 54 one of the most recognizable postwar EMUs in the Netherlands.

prussian-p8.name: Prussian P 8 / DRG Class 38.10-40
prussian-p8.signature: Economical, widely exported Garbe design with a distinctive gap between the middle and rear coupled axles.

rheingold-1928.name: Rheingold
rheingold-1928.signature: Cream-and-blue Pullman luxury along the Rhine before World War II

sbb-crocodile.name: SBB Ce 6/8 II
sbb-crocodile.signature: Long-nosed articulated Alpine freight electric that became Switzerland's best-known Crocodile.

shinkansen-0-series.name: 0 Series Shinkansen
shinkansen-0-series.signature: The rounded white-and-blue nose introduced the world to regular high-speed rail on the Tokaido Shinkansen.

sncf-cc-7100.name: SNCF CC 7100
sncf-cc-7100.signature: A Paul Arzens-styled French DC electric that helped turn SNCF speed research toward the Mistral era and, eventually, the TGV.

southern-railway-schools.name: SR V Class Schools 4-4-0
southern-railway-schools.signature: The last British 4-4-0 design and among Europe's most powerful of the type, named after English public schools.

tee-rabe.name: SBB-CFF-FFS RAe TEE II
tee-rabe.signature: Quad-voltage Swiss TEE trainset built to cross European power systems without changing locomotives.

tokaido-ef58.name: JNR Class EF58
tokaido-ef58.signature: Semi-streamlined brown or blue-and-cream cab-unit profile that became a postwar Tokaido express icon.

union-pacific-big-boy.name: Union Pacific Big Boy 4-8-8-4
union-pacific-big-boy.signature: A giant articulated 4-8-8-4 built to haul heavy freight over the Wasatch grades.

union-pacific-m10000.name: Union Pacific M-10000
union-pacific-m10000.nickname: The Streamliner; City of Salina; Tin Worm; Little Zip

ice-t.name: DB ICE T
ice-t.signature: Its active tilt brought ICE branding to faster services over Germany's curving conventional main lines.

tgv-pos.name: SNCF TGV POS
tgv-pos.signature: The POS sets linked eastern France with Germany and Switzerland and supplied the power cars for the 2007 speed record.

renfe-s130.name: Renfe Class 130
renfe-s130.signature: Its variable-gauge Talgo coaches let one train bridge Spanish high-speed and Iberian-gauge networks.

sbb-icn.name: SBB ICN
sbb-icn.signature: The ICN used active tilt to shorten Swiss InterCity journeys on winding main lines.

db-class-101.name: DB Class 101
db-class-101.signature: The red Class 101 became the standard electric face of German InterCity services after the Class 103 era.

sncf-cc-72000.name: SNCF CC 72000
sncf-cc-72000.signature: A powerful blue diesel icon for French mainline expresses beyond the wires.

amtrak-acela.name: Amtrak Acela
amtrak-acela.signature: Acela brought dedicated high-speed branding to the Northeast Corridor between Boston, New York and Washington.

crh380a.name: China Railways CRH380A
crh380a.signature: The CRH380A became one of the signature trainsets of China's fast-growing high-speed network.

vande-bharat.name: Vande Bharat Express
vande-bharat.signature: Vande Bharat is India's domestically built semi-high-speed EMU for premium intercity services.

gautrain.name: Gautrain
gautrain.signature: Gautrain links Johannesburg, Pretoria and OR Tambo Airport with a modern rapid-rail service.

queensland-tilt-train.name: Queensland Electric Tilt Train
queensland-tilt-train.signature: Queensland's electric tilt train set an Australian rail speed record and still serves the coastal corridor.

sarmiento-csr-emu.name: Sarmiento Line CSR EMU
sarmiento-csr-emu.signature: The CSR EMUs modernized Buenos Aires commuter service with high-capacity electric trainsets.
